scripts.test:api:allure: npx rimraf allure-results allure-report && npm run test:api && npm run report:allure
scripts.test:ui:allure: npx rimraf allure-results allure-report && npm run test:ui && npm run report:allure
scripts.report:allure: npx allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && npx allure open allure-report
scripts.clean: npx rimraf allure-results allure-report playwright-report test-results
